title: BIG-Bench Hard
description: Return the final answer for each BIG-Bench Hard reasoning item across the official BBH task collection.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns the first choice when available and otherwise falls back to the first token.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved BIG-Bench Hard question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return only the official final answer string for the current BIG-Bench Hard reasoning item. Use direct-answer format only: return the raw BBH target exactly, such as `(C)`, `False`, or `24`, with no explanation, reasoning trace, or extra text. Do not substitute option text for option labels unless the dataset target itself uses the text. Do not use browsing or external network access.
